description: Gillette's 2019 'We Believe' ad addressed toxic masculinity. It generated massive debate and polarized consumers, with some supporting the message and others calling it an insult to their core customer base.

key_events.description: YouTube video gains massive 'dislike' count compared to 'likes'.
Major conservative voices call for a permanent boycott of Gillette products.
Corporate executives defend the campaign as 'modernizing' the brand.
Analysis suggests the ad successfully engaged younger audiences despite the backlash.

calibration_notes: Highlights high-stakes brand repositioning and the resulting market polarization.
